hooks.command: zsh -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then "$ROOT/.claude/scripts/verify-go-package.sh" "$FILE"; fi'
zsh -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND"; ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(commit|push)"; then "$ROOT/.claude/scripts/pre-commit-check.sh"; fi'
zsh -c 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$ROOT"; DIRTY=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$DIRTY" ]]; then echo "=== 会话结束检查 ==="; echo "$DIRTY" | head -10; fi'
